has been found in compliance with requirement of

ISO 9001:2015 
For The Following Scope: 
 
 
SUPPLY, DELIVERY, INSTALLATION, SALES OPERATIONS, CUSTOMER SERVICE AND MAINTENANCE OF DESKTOP COMPUTERS, THIN 
CLIENT COMPUTERS, ZERO CLIENT, COMPUTER KIOSK, MICRO PC, NOTEBOOK COMPUTERS LAPTOP, RUGGED NOTEBOOKLAPTOP,

DISPLAY, INTERACTIVE PANELS AND ACCESSORIES, LIQUID CRYSTAL DISPLAY LCD PANEL ORMONITORS, KEYBOARD AND MOUSE , 
CABINET, SMPS, HEADPHONE, MIC, PEN DRIVE, MOTHER BOARD, SPEAKER, PRINTER OR PHOTO COPIER PAPER, ELEVISIONS, 
COMPUTER SERVERS, COPIER PAPER, PROJECTOR S CREEN, MULTIMEDIA PROJECTORS AND ITS ACCESSORIES, TABLETS, SMART 
PHONE, HEADPHONE, CHARGER, POWER BANK, EARPHONE, ACTIVE AND PASSIVE NETWORKING ITEMS, NETWORKING/SERVER RACK, 
SMART RACK, VARIOUS KIND OF CAMERA FOR CCTV SYSTEM, CABLES SUITABLE FOR CCTV SYSTEM (ACCESSORIES), VIDEO 
RECORDER FOR CCTV SYSTEM, BODY WORN CAMERA SYSTEM, BIOMETRIC ATTENDANCE SYSTEM, BIOMETRIC IDENTIFICATION 
EQUIPMENT, FACE RECOGNITION BIOMETRIC ATTENDANCE SYSTEM, BREATH ALCOHOL ANALYSERS, VIDEO CONFERENCING SYSTEM, 
AIR CONDITIONER, REFRIGERATOR AND ITS ACCESSORIES.
